title: Pan-Seared Sea Bass with Gooey Grits
description: A flavorful and easy-to-make dish featuring pan-seared sea bass served with a side of creamy gooey grits.
instructions: Season the sea bass fillets with salt and pepper.
Pan-fry the sea bass in butter until golden brown on both sides.
Transfer the pan to the preheated oven and bake for 8-10 minutes or until cooked through.
Meanwhile, cook the gooey grits according to the package instructions.
Stir in Greek yogurt to add creaminess to the grits.
Serve the pan-seared sea bass with a side of warm gooey grits.
Garnish with lemon wedges and serve immediately.
